integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the SEB Server web GUI to create users.

integrity.description: Verify the application being used is the genuine SEB Server.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI to directly insert users into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of navigating through the SEB Server UI (e.g., clicking 'Add User', filling out fields) rather than executing SQL commands in a terminal.
